// buildCommand note: We DO NOT run `prisma db push` or `prisma migrate deploy` during Vercel builds. The build environment may not have DB connectivity (IP allowlist, transient Neon outage, long-running migration) and a build-time DB call would fail the whole deploy. Schema is pushed out-of-band — either via `pnpm prisma db push` from a developer terminal, or via the Neon SQL Editor, or via a dedicated deploy hook. See docs/CLEAR_DEMO.md for the pattern.
